subcodes.first_line: Man must be distinguished from the animal, and his distinction lieth in this, that he becometh the cause of the comfort and tranquility of others [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انسان بايد ممتاز از حيوان باشد و امتياز انسان باين است که سبب راحت و آسايش ديگران گردد
subcodes.subjects: @the animal kingdom, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @man's distinction from the animal, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @true liberty; freedom
